result_text: W100 ctx8192 avoids the early CSS loop and reaches body, form, and popup markup, but spends far more budget in CSS than W50. It enters a script/comment loop around content event 3599 ('//') and ends by length at 4000 tokens without </html>. It is slower to first useful markup and less complete than W50 ctx8192.
method: Measured from stream_events_measured.jsonl and content_measured.txt. <script appears before <body because an invalid CSS-in-script block is emitted in <head>; body at content event 2757, form at 3185, first repeated comment loop at content event 3599 with conclusive repetition by 3607; finish_reason=length.
